caption: A man with dark skin, wearing black-rimmed glasses, a white button-down shirt with suspenders, and a red bow tie, is seated in a studio setting. He wears a distinctive, tall, grey wig and large black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone with a black pop filter. The background consists of a wall decorated with various framed photographs and clothing displays. On-screen graphics appear in the lower corners, including a logo that reads "THE GOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST." In the beginning, the man has his right hand raised to the side of his head. As the scene progresses, he lowers his arm and begins to gesture with his right hand while speaking, shifting his facial expression and body posture slightly.
